name: chip
title: Chip
description: Removable metadata chip — same control-density recipe as Tag, colored by semantic state (default / active / error / caution). Not a toggle/select control.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Chip. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.
Used internally by Chip. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

state.description: Semantic color: neutral / brand / negative / caution faint.
